name: github.com.argoproj.argo_events.pkg.apis.events.v1alpha1.GenericEventSource
description: GenericEventSource refers to a generic event source. It can be used to implement a custom event source.

authSecret.name:
AuthSecret holds a secret selector that contains a bearer token for authentication
+optional

config.name: Config is the event source configuration

insecure.description: Insecure determines the type of connection.

jsonBody.name:
JSONBody specifies that all event body payload coming from this
source will be JSON
+optional

metadata.name:
Metadata holds the user defined metadata which will passed along the event payload.
+optional

url.description: URL of the gRPC server that implements the event source.
